description: If you want a bag that's funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this backpack from nike. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it'll become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack!Height: 38 cmWidth: 37 cmDepth: 16 cmCapacity: 29 litresMade of 100% strong yarn dyed polyester for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityOne main zipped compartment to accommodate all your essentials with a mesh zipped pocketOne laptop sleeve to Fit a 15” laptop with an elasticated mouthOne zipped pocket on the front and a smaller pocket with a velcro closurenike swoosh appliquéd on the frontTwo zipped pockets and two insert pockets on the sides for additional spacePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to fit along the torso comfortablyNike Swoosh in stitch detailing on the strapHaul loop for handling easeBranded zips and sliders for easy useCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
